since_last: 53% of 89 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +4.72%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 53% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.17% · BTC -0.31% · Gold +1.40% · Nasdaq100 -1.04%. 53% of 89 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +4.72%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, Chip Equipment & AI Hardware lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +4.72%; weakest is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at -4.41%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: TER is the standout at -8.52%
cards.body: Leaders: NOW +7.95%, APP +6.89%, PUBM +6.86%, WDAY +6.47%, DV +6.28%. Laggards: TER -8.52%, NXPI -7.20%, VRT -7.18%, HPE -6.62%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -0.90% at $151.63
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -0.90% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
